query: SELECT date, COUNT(*) as count FROM events WHERE type LIKE '%nata%' GROUP BY date HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 1grUzB66oStVVFP.root --database gPiHJoB3NKeoE8WP6B5f8y --execute SELECT date, COUNT(*) as count FROM events WHERE type LIKE '%nata%' GROUP BY date HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 LIMIT 20;
